title: Japanese Lamb Stir Fry
description: A simple and flavorful Japanese-inspired stir fry made with lamb and smoky flavors, cooked quickly for a delicious dinner.

ingredients.name: Smoky Soy Sauce
ingredients.notes: or regular soy sauce with a pinch of smoked paprika

instructions: Heat sesame oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add lamb and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add ginger and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add smoky soy sauce and rice vinegar, and stir to combine.
Add green onions and stir-fry until wilted.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until lamb is cooked through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with sesame seeds and serve hot.
